projects.name: CandyLand Game
projects.subtitle: The Classic Board Game, CandyLand, coded in C++
projects.abstract: This project implements an interactive board game inspired by CandyLand. Players compete to reach the Candy Castle while solving puzzles and strategically deploying candies to slow opponents.

projects.name: Cat Game
projects.subtitle: A Day in the Life of a Cat!
projects.abstract: In this game, the player navigates the world as a cat through interactive mini-games that simulate a day in feline life.

projects.name: Vote Animation
projects.subtitle: An Animation built in Procreate
projects.abstract: A collaborative animation project designed to inspire people to vote.

projects.name: elle cold brew Branding
projects.subtitle: Moodboard + logo + can label design
projects.abstract: Branding exploration for a cold brew concept, including moodboard development, logo exploration, and packaging mockups.

projects.name: Hay Day: Digital Culture Study
projects.subtitle: Community + retention + demographics in mobile games
projects.abstract: Slide deck analyzing Hay Day as a social platform and how community systems influence player retention, identity, and engagement.
